title: enum AccountProductKind
excerpt: Are projectManagement and project_management from AccountProductKind one and the same?

posts.author: jeibbiej (John Bautista)
posts.cookedHtml: Are projectManagement and project_management from AccountProductKind one and the same?

posts.author: rachelatmonday (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @jeibbiej,

I checked with the team, and they said they are the same but to use project_management. The other is deprecated, so we’re working on editing this in the schema.

Thanks,
Rachel
